title: Instant Anchor
body:
# Instant Anchor
The Instant Anchor is a block that is used to freeze/set static any Valkyrien Skies ship, it toggles between static and not static every time it is given a redstone pulse.

The block will only make a ship static that wasn't previously static and vice versa, this should stop problems occurring as it cannot un-static a ship that was set to static by something other than the block itself.
